action.description: May clinical operations activate a trial site?

context.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate a trial site?
context.anomaly_observed: A site activation memo exists, but activation authority depends on protocol version and IRB approval scope.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Activation ACT-RAV-046 activates site S-19 under protocol P3.2 and consent C5 on 2026-06-25.
IRB approval IRB-RAV-046 covers site S-19, protocol P3.2, consent C5, and activation date 2026-06-25 before enrollment.
Startup memo says site-level feasibility is not a substitute for IRB activation approval.

policy_documents.content: Trial-site activation is complete only when IRB approval matches site, protocol version, consent form version, and activation date before enrollment.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
